title: Uncharted Horizons
description: 100+ Mods to explore in a vanilla plus fashion by overhauling the terrain and expanding the length of the game
body:
## About

This pack aims to remove the lack of exploration from the game, as well as improve the overall experience without the game feeling unstable or "too modded".
 

You can expect to find new visual addons, tweaks, terrain, structures, biomes, dimensions, building blocks, and many more without breaking the feeling of playing regular Minecraft.

 

 

## Important!

 

This mod pack is currently built around Fabric - (0.14.21) and Minecraft 1.19.2. These are the only supported versions at this time.

 


## Credits

Check out the creators of the mod, each and every one has put a ton of work into making this the best vanilla plus experience ever. Go check them out! (Disclaimer: I did not work with any of these modders directly. I am simply using their mods for my mod pack)

Naturalist - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist

Effective - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective

Kiwi - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kiwi-fabric

Falling Leaves - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

Illuminations - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations

Fresh Animations - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations
